nodes.name: Market Risk
nodes.description: The risk of losses in on- and off-balance sheet positions arising from movements in market prices.

children.name: Interest Rate Risk
children.description: The risk to earnings or capital arising from movements in interest rates.

children.name: Equity Price Risk
children.description: The risk that equity prices will change, affecting the value of equity holdings.

nodes.name: Credit Risk Management
nodes.description: The process of mitigating losses by understanding the adequacy of a bank's capital and loan loss reserves at any given period.

children.name: Basel III Compliance
children.description: International regulatory framework for banks, focusing on capital adequacy and liquidity.

nodes.name: Fraud Detection
nodes.description: Identifying and preventing unauthorized or illegal financial activities.
